user.title: Set up EntityMap
user.description: EntityMap analyzes dependencies between your Home Assistant devices, entities, automations, scripts, scenes, and helpers.

data.auto_refresh: Automatically refresh when changes are detected

abort.already_configured: EntityMap is already configured. Only one instance is needed.

data.auto_refresh: Automatically refresh when changes are detected

missing_entity_reference.title: Missing entity reference found
missing_entity_reference.description: EntityMap detected a reference to entity `{entity_id}` in `{source_name}`, but this entity does not exist. This may cause errors in your automations or scripts.

missing_device_reference.title: Missing device reference found
missing_device_reference.description: EntityMap detected a reference to device `{device_name}` in `{source_name}`, but this device no longer exists.

scan_failed.title: Dependency scan failed
scan_failed.description: EntityMap was unable to complete a dependency scan: {error}. Some dependency information may be outdated.

fragile_device_id_usage.title: Fragile device_id reference detected
fragile_device_id_usage.description: EntityMap found {count} automation(s) using direct device_id references, which may break if devices are re-paired or replaced. Consider using entity-based triggers and conditions instead.

scan.name: Scan dependencies
scan.description: Perform a full dependency scan of your Home Assistant configuration.

analyze_impact.name: Analyze impact
analyze_impact.description: Analyze the impact of removing, disabling, or replacing a specific node.

node_id.name: Node ID
node_id.description: The ID of the node to analyze (entity_id, device_id, etc.).

get_dependencies.name: Get dependencies
get_dependencies.description: Get all dependencies for a specific node.

node_id.name: Node ID
node_id.description: The ID of the node to query.
